intention: 表达更看重 A 而不是 B
avoidSaying: care the value more than name
sentencePatterns: Some customers care more about ... than ...
realLifeExamples: I care more about value for money than brand names.
Some customers care more about quality than fancy packaging.
usageNotes: 后面常接名词短语，特别适合表达价值取向。
productionPrompts: 用 I care more about ... than ... 造一句和购物或学习有关的句子。
